# grimoire-wizard

> Config-driven CLI wizard framework for Node.js. Write a YAML or JSON file — get an interactive terminal wizard.

## What it is

grimoire-wizard lets you define interactive CLI wizards as YAML or JSON config files. No code required for simple wizards. Full TypeScript API when you need to go deeper. Works as a standalone CLI, a library, or a non-interactive CI/CD step.

## Install

npm install -g grimoire-wizard

## Key capabilities

- 11 step types: text, select, multiselect, confirm, password, number, search, editor, path, toggle, note
- Conditional branching (when conditions), route-based navigation, back-navigation
- Post-wizard shell actions with {{step-id}} interpolation
- onComplete TypeScript handler file for complex business logic
- 6 theme presets (catppuccin, dracula, nord, tokyonight, monokai) + 15 spinner presets
- --mock mode for CI/CD, --dry-run preview, --json structured output
- Answer caching, progress persistence, review screen, wizard pipelines
- Programmatic API: runWizard(), defineWizard(), plugin system

## Full reference

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/YosefHayim/grimoire/main/docs/GRIMOIRE_REFERENCE.md

## Package

npm: grimoire-wizard
GitHub: https://github.com/YosefHayim/grimoire
License: MIT
Node: >= 18 (ESM)
